summary: Iteration 66 - Quote Request Flow testing complete. All features working: Navbar 'Request Quote' link removed, 'Get Quote' button present, /request-quote page loads with all form fields, form submission creates guest_lead and sales_opportunity in database, success page displays after submission, Admin Sales Queue shows quote requests with full details including service category, service details, and urgency.

tests: 'Request Quote' nav link removed from PublicNavbarV2
'Get Quote' button present in header (gold button)
All form fields present: full_name, email, phone, company, country, region, service_category, service_details, urgency, budget
Guest lead created in database with all fields
Confirmation email address shown on success page
Sales Queue page loads for admin users
Quote requests visible with 'Guest Lead' badge
Customer details displayed (name, email, phone, company)
Request Details section shows service_category, service_details, urgency

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed SalesQueuePage to use correct /api/sales-queue endpoint instead of non-existent /api/sales-opportunities/my-queue
seed_data_creation: Created test quote requests via form submission and API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote Request flow fully functional. Form at /request-quote submits to /api/guest-leads which auto-creates sales_opportunity. Admin can view in Sales Queue at /staff/queue. SalesQueuePage was fixed to use correct /api/sales-queue endpoint. All backend tests in test_quote_request_flow.py pass.
